## Summary

<!-- What and why, in a line or two. Link any issue or design decision (D*). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Integration/scenario coverage for new behavior (D22); unit tests only as a narrow supplement
- [ ] `./gradlew build` green locally (tests, ktlint, detekt, AGP lint, coverage gate)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` if the change is user-visible
- [ ] Conventional one-line commit(s); no em or en dashes
- [ ] Docs updated in the same change (AGENTS.md / docs/*) if a rule, command, or decision changed
